meta.summary: FastTree 2.2.0 approximately-maximum-likelihood phylogenetic tree inference from protein and nucleotide alignments.
meta.description: FastTree 2.2.0 approximately-maximum-likelihood phylogenetic tree inference from protein and nucleotide alignments.

test: FastTree -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'FastTree 2.2.0 Double precision:' >/dev/null && FastTreeMP -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'FastTree 2.2.0 Double precision, OpenMP (' >/dev/null && fasttree -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'FastTree 2.2.0 Double precision:' >/dev/null && grep -F 'source_sha256=db5f0d2d1e2b9099193a3a68a5c44f71166a870a7a4269398b9258b1e3478e12' /opt/fasttree/share/doc/fasttree/source.txt >/dev/null && ldd "$(command -v FastTreeMP)" > /tmp/taf-fasttree-ldd.txt && ! grep -F 'not found' /tmp/taf-fasttree-ldd.txt >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-fasttree-protein-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s
' '>s1' 'MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQ' '>s2' 'MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSYFSRQLEERLGLIEVQ' '>s3' 'MKTAYIAKQRQISFIKSHFSRQLDERLGLIEVQ' '>s4' 'MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKAHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQ' > protein.fa && FastTree -quiet -nosupport protein.fa > protein.nwk 2> protein.log && test -s protein.nwk && grep -F 's1:' protein.nwk >/dev/null && reroot.pl -midpoint < protein.nwk > rooted.nwk && test -s rooted.nwk && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-fasttree-dna-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s
' '>s1' 'ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT' '>s2' 'ACGTACGTACGTTCGTACGTACGT' '>s3' 'ACGTACGTTCGTACGTACGTACGT' '>s4' 'ACGTTCGTACGTACGTACGTACGT' > dna.fa && OMP_NUM_THREADS=2 FastTreeMP -quiet -nt -gtr -nosupport dna.fa > dna.nwk 2> dna.log && test -s dna.nwk && grep -F 's4:' dna.nwk >/dev/null && FastTree -quiet -nt -makematrix dna.fa > dna.dist 2> matrix.log && test -s dna.dist && grep -F 's1' dna.dist >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-fasttree-helpers-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s
' '>s1' 'MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQ' '>s2' 'MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSYFSRQLEERLGLIEVQ' '>s3' 'MKTAYIAKQRQISFIKSHFSRQLDERLGLIEVQ' '>s4' 'MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKAHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQ' > protein.fa && FastTree -quiet -gamma -log gamma.log protein.fa > tree.nwk 2> run.log && test -s tree.nwk && test -s gamma.log && GammaLogToPaup.pl gamma.log > paup.tsv && grep -F 'Tree' paup.tsv >/dev/null && CompareTree.pl -tree tree.nwk -versus tree.nwk > compare.tsv && grep -F 'Len1' compare.tsv >/dev/null && CompareToBootstrap.pl -tree tree.nwk -boot tree.nwk > boot.nwk && test -s boot.nwk && FastTree -quiet -nosupport -trans /opt/fasttree/share/fasttree/wag.mat protein.fa > trans.nwk 2> trans.log && test -s trans.nwk && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: FastTree
upstream.license: GPL-2.0-or-later for FastTree.c; upstream distribution includes GPL-3.0 LICENSE
upstream.citation: Price, Dehal and Arkin 2010, FastTree 2 -- Approximately Maximum-Likelihood Trees for Large Alignments
